title: Aeroworks
description: A Create: Aeronautics centered modpack with complementary mods added. Server included.
body:
## Make sure you allocate at least 6GB of RAM

[Discord Link](https://discord.gg/vNNBUVCbD3)

[Server Map](https://aero.gguppy.net/map/#world:-1530:0:653:7389:0:0:0:0:perspective)

Aeroworks is a NeoForge 1.21.1 server pack built for multiplayer worlds looking for maximum Aeronautics interaction. **Server Included**

The pack is centered on Create: Aeronautics, with the rest of the mod list chosen to support player built infrastructure, trade routes, airships, rail systems, factories, and large scale engineering projects. The best parts of the pack are meant to develop over time. Building an airship, setting up logistics, defending routes, moving goods, or connecting settlements should feel like part of the server’s history.

Aeronautics is backed up by a growing ecosystem of complementary mods, including Create: Big Cannons, Create: Propulsion, Create: Radars, CC: Sable, and Vista. Together, they push the pack toward mobile industry, ship mounted systems, air travel, navigation, automation, and larger multiplayer projects.

There is also enough tech depth to keep factories interesting. Mekanism and Oritech add more advanced machinery, power systems, and production chains, with plenty of room for strange interactions once players start putting factories on ships.

The world keeps a familiar Minecraft feel while giving exploration more weight. Tectonic & WWOO expand terrain generation, while the YUNG’s Better suite overhauls vanilla structures like dungeons, mineshafts, strongholds, ocean monuments, nether fortresses, temples, and more. Exploration should feel recognizable, but much more worth doing. End Remastered also gives the server a shared long-term goal and slows down the usual rush to the End.

The multiplayer side is built around player-driven systems. Trading, claims, transport networks, towns, alliances, rivalries, and infrastructure all come from what players choose to build. Voice chat, mapping tools, claims, and social mods are included to make cooperation easier without requiring strict roleplay or heavy server rules.

Aeroworks is for players who want an Aeronautics server that develops its own economy, landmarks, routes, factions, projects, and stories over time.
